text:
Once upon a time in a sleepy woodland town, there was a peculiar old tree known only as Old Oak Wisdom. It stood towering above the leafy canopy, its bark a rich tapestry of history.

A young girl named Lily loved wandering through the trees. One day, she stumbled upon Old Oak Wisdom.

It spoke in a voice as deep as the river.

"Lily," it said, "the world beyond our forest is vast. Think not only of your own adventures."

She pondered.

One day, she heard about a deep, enchanted hollow. Legend had it that within lay a forgotten garden.

Curiosity piqued.

So she ventured. With every leaf beneath her foot, Old Oak Wisdom whispered tales.

Finally, she reached the hollow.

The flowers sang. Her heart fluttered.

She plucked a flower. It glowed faintly.

And she danced.

That night, she dreamed a tree spoke a language invisible to others.

When awake, Lily knew a world existed beyond
